svg.text: A typed primitive in the schema. System icons from Lucide (MIT). Brand icons from Simple Icons (CC0). Always inline SVG.

g.text: • Default fill: ink. Override via color token.
• Stroke-based; participate in the type-scale color rules.
• Adding an icon = adding a typed name to SystemIconName; no escape hatch.

svg.text: BRAND ICONS · Simple Icons + multi-color brand glyphs
SIZE LADDER · same icon, four sizes

g.text: • Brand glyphs in branded contexts only (Chrome inside Chrome capsule).
• Brand glyphs follow the brand: minimum 20 px, clear-space, no recolor.
• System icons are monochrome; inherit ink, override semantically.
